title: Dani's Basement
description: A vanilla+ pack built for Dani's Basement server.
body:
Dani's Basement is a vanilla+ modpack designed for the Dani's Basement Minecraft server. It includes over 100 mods that expand on the base game without straying far from its core mechanics.

The pack focuses on technology, automation and exploration. For example, with Create, you can design complex machines and contraptions. With ComputerCraft you can program turtles to automate things, and with Valkyrien Skies you can build and pilot flying ships using physics-based flight.

It also includes client-side improvements such as performance improvements, inventory sorting and zooming. This pack is required to join the official server but can also be played in singleplayer or on other servers.
